tEn: RepVGG: Making VGG-style ConvNets Great Again
tZh: RepVGG：让VGG风格的卷积网络再次伟大
sEn: RepVGG achieves over 80% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet with a simple VGG-like architecture, running 83% faster than ResNet-50.
sZh: RepVGG通过结构重参数化技术，在推理时采用纯VGG风格网络，训练时使用多分支结构，在ImageNet上首次使普通模型达到80%以上top-1准确率，且比ResNet-50快83%。
absEn: We present a simple but powerful architecture of convolutional neural network, which has a VGG-like inference-time body composed of nothing but a stack of 3x3 convolution and ReLU, while the training-time model has a multi-branch topology. Such decoupling of the training-time and inference-time architecture is realized by a structural re-parameterization technique so that the model is named RepVGG. On ImageNet, RepVGG reaches over 80% top-1 accuracy, which is the first time for a plain model, to the best of our knowledge. On NVIDIA 1080Ti GPU, RepVGG models run 83% faster than ResNet-50 or 101% faster than ResNet-101 with higher accuracy and show favorable accuracy-speed trade-off compared to the state-of-the-art models like EfficientNet and RegNet. The code and trained models are available at https://github.com/megvii-model/RepVGG.
absZh: 我们提出了一种简单而强大的卷积神经网络架构，其推理时主体类似于VGG，仅由3x3卷积和ReLU堆叠而成，而训练时模型则具有多分支拓扑结构。这种训练时与推理时架构的解耦通过结构重参数化技术实现，因此该模型被命名为RepVGG。在ImageNet上，RepVGG达到了超过80%的top-1准确率，据我们所知，这是普通模型首次达到这一水平。在NVIDIA 1080Ti GPU上，RepVGG模型比ResNet-50快83%，比ResNet-101快101%，且准确率更高，与EfficientNet和RegNet等最先进模型相比，显示出良好的准确率-速度权衡。代码和训练好的模型可在https://github.com/megvii-model/RepVGG获取。

contrib.en: Proposes RepVGG, a VGG-style plain architecture with only 3x3 conv and ReLU for inference.
contrib.zh: 提出RepVGG，一种VGG风格的纯架构，推理时仅由3x3卷积和ReLU组成。

contrib.en: Introduces structural re-parameterization to decouple training-time multi-branch and inference-time plain topology.
contrib.zh: 引入结构重参数化技术，解耦训练时的多分支拓扑与推理时的纯拓扑。

contrib.en: Achieves over 80% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet with a plain model for the first time.
contrib.zh: 首次以纯模型在ImageNet上达到超过80%的top-1准确率。

contrib.en: Demonstrates favorable speed-accuracy trade-off compared to state-of-the-art models like EfficientNet and RegNet.
contrib.zh: 与EfficientNet和RegNet等最先进模型相比，展现出有利的速度-准确率权衡。

contrib.en: Shows effectiveness in semantic segmentation with higher speed and accuracy than ResNet backbones.
contrib.zh: 在语义分割中展现出比ResNet骨干网络更高的速度和准确率。

contrib.en: Provides simple and practical ConvNets suitable for GPU and specialized hardware.
contrib.zh: 提供适用于GPU和专用硬件的简单实用的卷积网络。

limits.en: RepVGG is less parameter-efficient than mobile-regime models like MobileNets for low-power devices.
limits.zh: RepVGG在低功耗设备上不如MobileNets等移动模型参数高效。

limits.en: The structural re-parameterization requires careful handling of batch normalization and branch conversion.
limits.zh: 结构重参数化需要谨慎处理批归一化和分支转换。

limits.en: The method is primarily designed for GPU and may not be optimal for all hardware platforms.
limits.zh: 该方法主要针对GPU设计，可能并非对所有硬件平台最优。

limits.en: The ablation studies show that removing identity or 1x1 branches significantly reduces accuracy.
limits.zh: 消融研究表明，移除恒等分支或1x1分支会显著降低准确率。

limits.en: The dilated convolution implementation in segmentation is inefficient, slowing inference.
limits.zh: 分割中的空洞卷积实现效率低，拖慢推理速度。

items.en: We present a simple but powerful architecture of convolutional neural network, which has a VGG-like inference-time body composed of nothing but a stack of 3×3333\times 3 convolution and ReLU, while the training-time model has a multi-branch topology. Such decoupling of the training-time and inference-time architecture is realized by a structural re-parameterization technique so that the model is named RepVGG. On ImageNet, RepVGG reaches over 80% top-1 accuracy, which is the first time for a plain model, to the best of our knowledge. On NVIDIA 1080Ti GPU, RepVGG models run 83% faster than ResNet-50 or 101% faster than ResNet-101 with higher accuracy and show favorable accuracy-speed trade-off compared to the state-of-the-art models like EfficientNet and RegNet. The code and trained models are available at https://github.com/megvii-model/RepVGG.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种简单但强大的卷积神经网络架构，其推理阶段主体类似于VGG，仅由一堆3×3卷积和ReLU组成，而训练阶段模型具有多分支拓扑结构。这种训练时和推理时架构的解耦通过结构重参数化技术实现，因此该模型被命名为RepVGG。在ImageNet上，RepVGG达到了超过80%的top-1准确率，据我们所知，这是普通模型首次达到这一水平。在NVIDIA 1080Ti GPU上，RepVGG模型比ResNet-50快83%，比ResNet-101快101%，且准确率更高，与EfficientNet和RegNet等最先进模型相比，显示出良好的准确率-速度权衡。代码和训练好的模型可在https://github.com/megvii-model/RepVGG获取。

items.en: A classic Convolutional Neural Network (ConvNet), VGG [31], achieved huge success in image recognition with a simple architecture composed of a stack of conv, ReLU, and pooling. With Inception [33, 34, 32, 19], ResNet [12] and DenseNet [17], a lot of research interests were shifted to well-designed architectures, making the models more and more complicated. Some recent architectures are based on automatic [44, 29, 23] or manual [28] architecture search, or a searched compound scaling strategy [35].
items.zh: 经典的卷积神经网络（ConvNet）VGG [31] 通过由一堆卷积、ReLU和池化组成的简单架构在图像识别中取得了巨大成功。随着Inception [33, 34, 32, 19]、ResNet [12] 和DenseNet [17] 的出现，大量研究兴趣转向了精心设计的架构，使模型变得越来越复杂。一些最近的架构基于自动 [44, 29, 23] 或手动 [28] 架构搜索，或搜索到的复合缩放策略 [35]。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Sketch of RepVGG architecture. RepVGG has 5 stages and conducts down-sampling via stride-2 convolution at the beginning of a stage. Here we only show the first 4 layers of a specific stage. As inspired by ResNet [12], we also use identity and 1×1111\times 1 branches, but only for training.
items.capZh: 图2：RepVGG架构示意图。RepVGG有5个阶段，并在每个阶段开始时通过步长为2的卷积进行下采样。这里我们只展示特定阶段的前4层。受ResNet [12] 启发，我们也使用了恒等映射和1×1分支，但仅用于训练。

items.en: Though many complicated ConvNets deliver higher accuracy than the simple ones, the drawbacks are significant. 1) The complicated multi-branch designs (e.g., residual-addition in ResNet and branch-concatenation in Inception) make the model difficult to implement and customize, slow down the inference and reduce the memory utilization. 2) Some components (e.g., depthwise conv in Xception [3] and MobileNets [16, 30] and channel shuffle in ShuffleNets [24, 41]) increase the memory access cost and lack supports of various devices. With so many factors affecting the inference speed, the amount of floating-point operations (FLOPs) does not precisely reflect the actual speed. Though some novel models have lower FLOPs than the old-fashioned ones like VGG and ResNet-18/34/50 [12], they may not run faster (Table. 4). Consequently, VGG and the original versions of ResNets are still heavily used for real-world applications in both academia and industry.
items.zh: 尽管许多复杂的ConvNet比简单架构具有更高的准确率，但其缺点也很明显。1) 复杂的多分支设计（例如ResNet中的残差相加和Inception中的分支拼接）使得模型难以实现和定制，降低了推理速度并减少了内存利用率。2) 一些组件（例如Xception [3] 和MobileNets [16, 30] 中的深度可分离卷积，以及ShuffleNets [24, 41] 中的通道混洗）增加了内存访问成本，并且缺乏对各种设备的支持。由于影响推理速度的因素众多，浮点运算次数（FLOPs）并不能精确反映实际速度。尽管一些新型模型的FLOPs低于VGG和ResNet-18/34/50 [12] 等旧式模型，但它们可能运行得并不更快（表4）。因此，在学术界和工业界的实际应用中，VGG和原始版本的ResNet仍然被大量使用。

items.en: In this paper, we propose RepVGG, a VGG-style architecture which outperforms many complicated models (Fig. 1). RepVGG has the following advantages.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了RepVGG，一种VGG风格的架构，其性能优于许多复杂模型（图1）。RepVGG具有以下优点。

items.en: The model has a VGG-like plain (a.k.a. feed-forward) topology 111In this paper, a network topology only focuses on how the components connect to others, an architecture refers to the topology together with the specification of components like depth and width, and a structure may refer to any component or part of the architecture. without any branches, which means every layer takes the output of its only preceding layer as input and feeds the output into its only following layer.
items.zh: 该模型具有类似VGG的普通（即前馈）拓扑结构¹¹¹本文中，网络拓扑仅关注组件如何相互连接，架构指拓扑以及深度和宽度等组件的规范，结构可指架构的任何组件或部分。，没有任何分支，这意味着每一层仅将前一层的输出作为输入，并将其输出馈送到下一层。

items.en: The model’s body uses only 3×3333\times 3 conv and ReLU.
items.zh: 模型主体仅使用3×3卷积和ReLU。

items.en: The concrete architecture (including the specific depth and layer widths) is instantiated with no automatic search [44], manual refinement [28], compound scaling [35], nor other heavy designs.
items.zh: 具体架构（包括具体深度和层宽度）无需自动搜索 [44]、手动优化 [28]、复合缩放 [35] 或其他繁重设计即可实例化。

items.en: It is challenging for a plain model to reach a comparable level of performance as the multi-branch architectures. An explanation is that a multi-branch topology, e.g., ResNet, makes the model an implicit ensemble of numerous shallower models [36], so that training a multi-branch model avoids the gradient vanishing problem.
items.zh: 对于普通模型来说，要达到与多分支架构相当的性能水平是具有挑战性的。一种解释是，多分支拓扑（例如ResNet）使模型成为众多浅层模型的隐式集成 [36]，因此训练多分支模型可以避免梯度消失问题。

items.en: Since the benefits of multi-branch architecture are all for training and the drawbacks are undesired for inference, we propose to decouple the training-time multi-branch and inference-time plain architecture via structural re-parameterization, which means converting the architecture from one to another via transforming its parameters. To be specific, a network structure is coupled with a set of parameters, e.g., a conv layer is represented by a 4th-order kernel tensor. If the parameters of a certain structure can be converted into another set of parameters coupled by another structure, we can equivalently replace the former with the latter, so that the overall network architecture is changed.
items.zh: 由于多分支架构的优势全部体现在训练阶段，而其缺点在推理阶段是不希望的，我们提出通过结构重参数化将训练时的多分支架构与推理时的普通架构解耦，这意味着通过转换参数将一种架构转换为另一种架构。具体来说，网络结构与一组参数相关联，例如卷积层由四阶核张量表示。如果某种结构的参数可以转换为另一种结构所耦合的另一组参数，我们就可以等价地用后者替换前者，从而改变整个网络架构。

items.en: Specifically, we construct the training-time RepVGG using identity and 1×1111\times 1 branches, which is inspired by ResNet but in a different way that the branches can be removed by structural re-parameterization (Fig. 2,4). After training, we perform the transformation with simple algebra, as an identity branch can be regarded as a degraded 1×1111\times 1 conv, and the latter can be further regarded as a degraded 3×3333\times 3 conv, so that we can construct a single 3×3333\times 3 kernel with the trained parameters of the original 3×3333\times 3 kernel, identity and 1×1111\times 1 branches and batch normalization (BN) [19] layers. Consequently, the transformed model has a stack of 3×3333\times 3 conv layers, which is saved for test and deployment.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们使用恒等映射和1×1分支构建训练时的RepVGG，这受ResNet启发但方式不同，这些分支可以通过结构重参数化移除（图2,4）。训练后，我们通过简单的代数运算进行转换，因为恒等分支可以视为退化的1×1卷积，而后者又可以进一步视为退化的3×3卷积，因此我们可以用原始3×3核、恒等分支、1×1分支和批归一化（BN）[19] 层的训练参数构建单个3×3核。因此，转换后的模型具有一堆3×3卷积层，用于测试和部署。

items.en: Notably, the body of an inference-time RepVGG only has one single type of operator: 3×3333\times 3 conv followed by ReLU, which makes RepVGG fast on generic computing devices like GPUs. Even better, RepVGG allows for specialized hardware to achieve even higher speed because given the chip size and power consumption, the fewer types of operators we require, the more computing units we can integrate onto the chip. Consequently, an inference chip specialized for RepVGG can have an enormous number of 3×3333\times 3-ReLU units and fewer memory units (because the plain topology is memory-economical, as shown in Fig. 3). Our contributions are summarized as follows.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，推理时RepVGG的主体只有一种类型的算子：3×3卷积后接ReLU，这使得RepVGG在通用计算设备（如GPU）上运行快速。更棒的是，RepVGG允许专用硬件实现更高的速度，因为给定芯片尺寸和功耗，我们需要的算子类型越少，可以在芯片上集成的计算单元就越多。因此，专为RepVGG设计的推理芯片可以拥有大量的3×3-ReLU单元和更少的内存单元（因为普通拓扑结构节省内存，如图3所示）。我们的贡献总结如下。

items.en: We propose RepVGG, a simple architecture with favorable speed-accuracy trade-off compared to the state-of-the-arts.
items.zh: 我们提出了RepVGG，一种简单的架构，与最先进模型相比具有有利的速度-准确率权衡。

items.en: We propose to use structural re-parameterization to decouple a training-time multi-branch topology with an inference-time plain architecture.
items.zh: 我们提出使用结构重参数化将训练时的多分支拓扑与推理时的普通架构解耦。

items.en: We show the effectiveness of RepVGG in image classification and semantic segmentation, and the efficiency and ease of implementation.
items.zh: 我们展示了RepVGG在图像分类和语义分割中的有效性，以及其高效性和易于实现的特点。

items.en: After VGG [31] raised the top-1 accuracy of ImageNet classification to above 70%, there have been many innovations in making ConvNets complicated for high performance, e.g., the contemporary GoogLeNet [33] and later Inception models [34, 32, 19] adopted elaborately designed multi-branch architectures, ResNet [12] proposed a simplified two-branch architecture, and DenseNet [17] made the topology more complicated by connecting lower-level layers with numerous higher-level ones. Neural architecture search (NAS) [44, 29, 23, 35] and manual designing space design [28] can generate ConvNets with higher performance but at the costs of vast computing resources or manpower. Some large versions of NAS-generated models are even not trainable on ordinary GPUs, hence limiting the applications. Except for the inconvenience of implementation, the complicated models may reduce the degree of parallelism [24] hence slow down the inference.
items.zh: 在VGG [31] 将ImageNet分类的top-1准确率提升至70%以上之后，出现了许多通过使ConvNet复杂化以获得高性能的创新，例如同时期的GoogLeNet [33] 和后来的Inception模型 [34, 32, 19] 采用了精心设计的多分支架构，ResNet [12] 提出了简化的双分支架构，DenseNet [17] 通过将低层与众多高层连接使拓扑更加复杂。神经架构搜索（NAS）[44, 29, 23, 35] 和手动设计空间设计 [28] 可以生成性能更高的ConvNet，但代价是巨大的计算资源或人力。一些NAS生成模型的大版本甚至无法在普通GPU上训练，从而限制了应用。除了实现上的不便，复杂模型可能降低并行度 [24]，从而减慢推理速度。

full.secZh: 2.2 单路径模型的有效训练

items.en: There have been some attempts to train ConvNets without branches. However, the prior works mainly sought to make the very deep models converge with reasonable accuracy, but not achieve better performance than the complicated models. Consequently, the methods and resultant models were neither simple nor practical. An initialization method [37] was proposed to train extremely deep plain ConvNets. With a mean-field-theory-based scheme, 10,000-layer networks were trained over 99% accuracy on MNIST and 82% on CIFAR-10. Though the models were not practical (even LeNet-5 [21] can reach 99.3% accuracy on MNIST and VGG-16 can reach above 93% on CIFAR-10), the theoretical contributions were insightful. A recent work [25] combined several techniques including Leaky ReLU, max-norm and careful initialization. On ImageNet, it showed that a plain ConvNet with 147M parameters could reach 74.6% top-1 accuracy, which was 2% lower than its reported baseline (ResNet-101, 76.6%, 45M parameters).
items.zh: 已有一些尝试训练无分支的ConvNet。然而，先前的工作主要旨在使极深模型以合理的准确率收敛，但并未实现比复杂模型更好的性能。因此，这些方法和生成的模型既不简单也不实用。提出了一种初始化方法 [37] 来训练极深的普通ConvNet。基于平均场理论的方案，在MNIST上训练了超过99%准确率的10000层网络，在CIFAR-10上达到82%。尽管这些模型并不实用（甚至LeNet-5 [21] 在MNIST上可以达到99.3%的准确率，VGG-16在CIFAR-10上可以达到93%以上），但其理论贡献具有洞察力。最近的一项工作 [25] 结合了多种技术，包括Leaky ReLU、最大范数和仔细初始化。在ImageNet上，它表明一个具有1.47亿参数的普通ConvNet可以达到74.6%的top-1准确率，比其报告的基线（ResNet-101，76.6%，4500万参数）低2%。

items.en: Notably, this paper is not merely a demonstration that plain models can converge reasonably well, and does not intend to train extremely deep ConvNets like ResNets. Rather, we aim to build a simple model with reasonable depth and favorable accuracy-speed trade-off, which can be simply implemented with the most common components (e.g., regular conv and BN) and simple algebra.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，本文不仅仅是证明普通模型可以合理收敛，也不旨在训练像ResNet那样的极深ConvNet。相反，我们旨在构建一个具有合理深度和有利准确率-速度权衡的简单模型，该模型可以使用最常见的组件（例如常规卷积和BN）和简单代数轻松实现。

items.en: DiracNet [39] is a re-parameterization method related to ours. It builds deep plain models by encoding the kernel of a conv layer as W^=diag​(𝐚)​I+diag​(𝐛)​Wnorm^Wdiag𝐚Idiag𝐛subscriptWnorm\hat{\mathrm{W}}=\text{diag}(\mathbf{a})\mathrm{I}+\text{diag}(\mathbf{b})\mathrm{W}_{\text{norm}}, where W^^W\hat{\mathrm{W}} is the eventual weight used for convolution (a 4th-order tensor viewed as a matrix), 𝐚𝐚\mathbf{a} and 𝐛𝐛\mathbf{b} are learned vectors, and WnormsubscriptWnorm\mathrm{W}_{\text{norm}} is the normalized learnable kernel. Compared to ResNets with comparable amount of parameters, the top-1 accuracy of DiracNet is 2.29% lower on CIFAR-100 (78.46% vs. 80.75%) and 0.62% lower on ImageNet (72.21% of DiracNet-34 vs. 72.83% of ResNet-34). DiracNet differs from our method in two aspects. 1) The training-time behavior of RepVGG is implemented by the actual dataflow through a concrete structure which can be later converted into another, while DiracNet merely uses another mathematical expression of conv kernels for easier optimization. In other words, a training-time RepVGG is a real multi-branch model, but a DiracNet is not. 2) The performance of a DiracNet is higher than a normally parameterized plain model but lower than a comparable ResNet, while RepVGG models outperform ResNets by a large margin. Asym Conv Block (ACB) [10], DO-Conv [1] and ExpandNet [11] can also be viewed as structural re-parameterization in the sense that they convert a block into a conv. Compared to our method, the difference is that they are designed for component-level improvements and used as a drop-in replacement for conv layers in any architecture, while our structural re-parameterization is critical for training plain ConvNets, as shown in Sect. 4.2.
items.zh: DiracNet [39] 是一种与我们相关的重参数化方法。它通过将卷积层的核编码为 W^=diag(a)I+diag(b)Wnorm 来构建深度普通模型，其中 W^ 是最终用于卷积的权重（视为矩阵的四阶张量），a 和 b 是学习到的向量，Wnorm 是归一化的可学习核。与参数数量相当的 ResNet 相比，DiracNet 在 CIFAR-100 上的 top-1 准确率低 2.29%（78.46% vs. 80.75%），在 ImageNet 上低 0.62%（DiracNet-34 的 72.21% vs. ResNet-34 的 72.83%）。DiracNet 与我们的方法在两个方面不同：1) RepVGG 的训练时行为是通过具体结构的实际数据流实现的，该结构之后可以转换为另一种结构，而 DiracNet 仅使用卷积核的另一种数学表达式以便于优化。换句话说，训练时的 RepVGG 是一个真正的多分支模型，而 DiracNet 则不是。2) DiracNet 的性能高于正常参数化的普通模型，但低于可比的 ResNet，而 RepVGG 模型则大幅优于 ResNet。非对称卷积块 (ACB) [10]、DO-Conv [1] 和 ExpandNet [11] 也可以视为结构重参数化，因为它们将块转换为卷积。与我们的方法相比，区别在于它们是为组件级改进而设计的，并作为任何架构中卷积层的即插即用替代品，而我们的结构重参数化对于训练普通 ConvNet 至关重要，如第 4.2 节所示。

items.en: RepVGG uses only 3×3333\times 3 conv because it is highly optimized by some modern computing libraries like NVIDIA cuDNN [2] and Intel MKL [18] on GPU and CPU. Table. 1 shows the theoretical FLOPs, actual running time and computational density (measured in Tera FLoating-point Operations Per Second, TFLOPS) 222As a common practice, we count a multiply-add as a single operation when counting the theoretical FLOPs, but hardware vendors like NVIDIA usually count it as two operations when reporting the TFLOPS. tested with cuDNN 7.5.0 on a 1080Ti GPU. The theoretical computational density of 3×3333\times 3 conv is around 4×4\times as the others, suggesting the total theoretical FLOPs is not a comparable proxy for the actual speed among different architectures. Winograd [20] is a classic algorithm for accelerating 3×3333\times 3 conv (only if the stride is 1), which has been well supported (and enabled by default) by libraries like cuDNN and MKL. For example, with the standard F​(2×2,3×3)𝐹2233F(2\times 2,3\times 3) Winograd, the amount of multiplications (MULs) of a 3×3333\times 3 conv is reduced to 4949\frac{4}{9} of the original. Since the multiplications are much more time-consuming than additions, we count the MULs to measure the computational costs with Winograd support (denoted by Wino MULs in Table. 4, 5). Note that the specific computing library and hardware determine whether to use Winograd for each operator because small-scale convolutions may not be accelerated due to the memory overhead. 333Our results are manually tested operator-by-operator with cuDNN 7.5.0, 1080Ti. For each stride-1 3×3333\times 3 conv, we test its time usage along with a stride-2 counterpart of the same FLOPs. We assume the former uses F​(2×2,3×3)𝐹2233F(2\times 2,3\times 3) Winograd if the latter runs significantly slower. Such a testing method is approximate hence the results are for reference only.
items.zh: RepVGG 仅使用 3×3 卷积，因为它在 GPU 和 CPU 上被一些现代计算库（如 NVIDIA cuDNN [2] 和 Intel MKL [18]）高度优化。表 1 显示了理论 FLOPs、实际运行时间和计算密度（以每秒万亿次浮点运算 TFLOPS 衡量）²²²按照惯例，我们在计算理论 FLOPs 时将一次乘加算作一次操作，但硬件供应商（如 NVIDIA）在报告 TFLOPS 时通常将其算作两次操作。使用 cuDNN 7.5.0 在 1080Ti GPU 上测试。3×3 卷积的理论计算密度约为其他卷积的 4 倍，表明总理论 FLOPs 不能作为不同架构间实际速度的可比代理。Winograd [20] 是加速 3×3 卷积（仅当步长为 1 时）的经典算法，已被 cuDNN 和 MKL 等库良好支持（并默认启用）。例如，使用标准 F(2×2,3×3) Winograd，3×3 卷积的乘法次数减少到原来的 4/9。由于乘法比加法更耗时，我们计算乘法次数来衡量支持 Winograd 的计算成本（在表 4、5 中记为 Wino MULs）。注意，特定的计算库和硬件决定是否对每个算子使用 Winograd，因为小规模卷积可能因内存开销而无法加速。³³³我们的结果是使用 cuDNN 7.5.0 在 1080Ti 上逐算子手动测试的。对于每个步长为 1 的 3×3 卷积，我们测试其时间使用情况，并与相同 FLOPs 的步长为 2 的对应卷积进行比较。如果后者运行明显较慢，我们假设前者使用 F(2×2,3×3) Winograd。这种测试方法是近似的，因此结果仅供参考。

full.secZh: 3.1 简单即快速、节省内存、灵活

items.en: There are at least three reasons for using simple ConvNets: they are fast, memory-economical and Flexible.
items.zh: 使用简单 ConvNet 至少有三个原因：速度快、内存经济且灵活。

items.en: Fast Many recent multi-branch architectures have lower theoretical FLOPs than VGG but may not run faster. For example, VGG-16 has 8.4×8.4\times FLOPs as EfficientNet-B3 [35] but runs 1.8×1.8\times faster on 1080Ti (Table. 4), which means the computational density of the former is 15×15\times as the latter. Except for the acceleration brought by Winograd conv, the discrepancy between FLOPs and speed can be attributed to two important factors that have considerable affection on speed but are not taken into account by FLOPs: the memory access cost (MAC) and degree of parallelism [24]. For example, though the required computations of branch addition or concatenation are negligible, the MAC is significant. Moreover, MAC constitutes a large portion of time usage in groupwise convolution. On the other hand, a model with high degree of parallelism could be much faster than another one with low degree of parallelism, under the same FLOPs. As multi-branch topology is widely adopted in Inception and auto-generated architectures, multiple small operators are used instead of a few large ones. A prior work [24] reported that the number of fragmented operators (i.e. the number of individual conv or pooling operations in one building block) in NASNET-A [43] is 13, which is unfriendly to devices with strong parallel computing powers like GPU and introduces extra overheads such as kernel launching and synchronization. In contrast, this number is 2 or 3 in ResNets, and we make it 1: a single conv.
items.zh: 快速 许多最近的多分支架构的理论 FLOPs 低于 VGG，但可能运行速度并不更快。例如，VGG-16 的 FLOPs 是 EfficientNet-B3 [35] 的 8.4 倍，但在 1080Ti 上运行速度快 1.8 倍（表 4），这意味着前者的计算密度是后者的 15 倍。除了 Winograd 卷积带来的加速外，FLOPs 与速度之间的差异可归因于两个重要因素，它们对速度有显著影响但 FLOPs 未考虑：内存访问成本 (MAC) 和并行度 [24]。例如，尽管分支加法或拼接所需的计算量可忽略，但 MAC 显著。此外，MAC 在分组卷积中占用了大量时间。另一方面，在相同 FLOPs 下，高并行度的模型可能比低并行度的模型快得多。由于多分支拓扑在 Inception 和自动生成架构中被广泛采用，多个小算子被用来代替少数大算子。先前的工作 [24] 报告称，NASNET-A [43] 中碎片化算子（即一个构建块中单个卷积或池化操作的数量）的数量为 13，这对具有强大并行计算能力的设备（如 GPU）不友好，并引入了额外开销，如内核启动和同步。相比之下，ResNet 中这个数字是 2 或 3，而我们将其变为 1：单个卷积。

items.en: Memory-economical The multi-branch topology is memory-inefficient because the results of every branch need to be kept until the addition or concatenation, significantly raising the peak value of memory occupation. Fig. 3 shows that the input to a residual block need to be kept until the addition. Assuming the block maintains the feature map size, the peak value of extra memory occupation is 2×\times as the input. In contrast, a plain topology allows the memory occupied by the inputs to a specific layer to be immediately released when the operation is finished. When designing specialized hardware, a plain ConvNet allows deep memory optimizations and reduces the costs of memory units so that we can integrate more computing units onto the chip.
items.zh: 内存经济 多分支拓扑内存效率低，因为每个分支的结果需要保留到加法或拼接完成，显著提高了内存占用的峰值。图 3 显示，残差块的输入需要保留到加法完成。假设块保持特征图大小，额外内存占用的峰值是输入的 2 倍。相比之下，普通拓扑允许在操作完成时立即释放特定层输入所占用的内存。在设计专用硬件时，普通 ConvNet 允许深度内存优化并降低内存单元成本，从而可以在芯片上集成更多计算单元。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Peak memory occupation in residual and plain model. If the residual block maintains the size of feature map, the peak value of extra memory occupied by feature maps will be 2×2\times as the input. The memory occupied by the parameters is small compared to the features hence ignored.
items.capZh: 图 3：残差模型和普通模型中的峰值内存占用。如果残差块保持特征图大小，特征图占用的额外内存峰值将是输入的 2 倍。参数占用的内存与特征相比很小，因此忽略。

items.en: Flexible The multi-branch topology imposes constraints on the architectural specification. For example, ResNet requires the conv layers to be organized as residual blocks, which limits the flexibility because the last conv layers of every residual block have to produce tensors of the same shape, or the shortcut addition will not make sense. Even worse, multi-branch topology limits the application of channel pruning [22, 14], which is a practical technique to remove some unimportant channels, and some methods can optimize the model structure by automatically discovering the appropriate width of each layer [8]. However, multi-branch models make pruning tricky and result in significant performance degradation or low acceleration ratio [7, 22, 9]. In contrast, a plain architecture allows us to freely configure every conv layer according to our requirements and prune to obtain a better performance-efficiency trade-off.
items.zh: 灵活 多分支拓扑对架构规范施加了约束。例如，ResNet 要求卷积层组织为残差块，这限制了灵活性，因为每个残差块的最后一个卷积层必须产生相同形状的张量，否则捷径加法将失去意义。更糟糕的是，多分支拓扑限制了通道剪枝 [22, 14] 的应用，这是一种去除不重要通道的实用技术，一些方法可以通过自动发现每层合适宽度来优化模型结构 [8]。然而，多分支模型使剪枝变得棘手，并导致显著的性能下降或低加速比 [7, 22, 9]。相比之下，普通架构允许我们根据需求自由配置每个卷积层，并通过剪枝获得更好的性能-效率权衡。

items.en: Plain ConvNets have many strengths but one fatal weakness: the poor performance. For example, with modern components like BN [19], a VGG-16 can reach over 72% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, which seems outdated. Our structural re-parameterization method is inspired by ResNet, which explicitly constructs a shortcut branch to model the information flow as y=x+f​(x)𝑦𝑥𝑓𝑥y=x+f(x) and uses a residual block to learn f𝑓f. When the dimensions of x𝑥x and f​(x)𝑓𝑥f(x) do not match, it becomes y=g​(x)+f​(x)𝑦𝑔𝑥𝑓𝑥y=g(x)+f(x), where g​(x)𝑔𝑥g(x) is a convolutional shortcut implemented by a 1×1111\times 1 conv. An explanation for the success of ResNets is that such a multi-branch architecture makes the model an implicit ensemble of numerous shallower models [36]. Specifically, with n𝑛n blocks, the model can be interpreted as an ensemble of 2nsuperscript2𝑛2^{n} models, since every block branches the flow into two paths.
items.zh: 普通 ConvNet 有许多优点，但有一个致命弱点：性能差。例如，使用 BN [19] 等现代组件，VGG-16 在 ImageNet 上可以达到超过 72% 的 top-1 准确率，这似乎已经过时。我们的结构重参数化方法受 ResNet 启发，ResNet 显式构建了一个捷径分支来建模信息流为 y=x+f(x)，并使用残差块学习 f。当 x 和 f(x) 的维度不匹配时，变为 y=g(x)+f(x)，其中 g(x) 是由 1×1 卷积实现的卷积捷径。ResNet 成功的一个解释是，这种多分支架构使模型成为众多更浅模型的隐式集成 [36]。具体来说，有 n 个块时，模型可以解释为 2^n 个模型的集成，因为每个块将流分支为两条路径。

items.en: Since the multi-branch topology has drawbacks for inference but the branches seem beneficial to training [36], we use multiple branches to make an only-training-time ensemble of numerous models. To make most of the members shallower or simpler, we use ResNet-like identity (only if the dimensions match) and 1×1111\times 1 branches so that the training-time information flow of a building block is y=x+g​(x)+f​(x)𝑦𝑥𝑔𝑥𝑓𝑥y=x+g(x)+f(x). We simply stack several such blocks to construct the training-time model. From the same perspective as [36], the model becomes an ensemble of 3nsuperscript3𝑛3^{n} members with n𝑛n such blocks.
items.zh: 由于多分支拓扑在推理时有缺点，但分支似乎对训练有益 [36]，我们使用多个分支来创建一个仅训练时的众多模型集成。为了使大多数成员更浅或更简单，我们使用类似 ResNet 的恒等分支（仅当维度匹配时）和 1×1 分支，使得训练时构建块的信息流为 y=x+g(x)+f(x)。我们简单地堆叠几个这样的块来构建训练时模型。从 [36] 的相同角度来看，具有 n 个这样的块的模型成为 3^n 个成员的集成。

items.en: This transformation also applies to the identity branch because an identity can be viewed as a 1×1111\times 1 conv with an identity matrix as the kernel. After such transformations, we will have one 3×3333\times 3 kernel, two 1×1111\times 1 kernels, and three bias vectors. Then we obtain the final bias by adding up the three bias vectors, and the final 3×3333\times 3 kernel by adding the 1×1111\times 1 kernels onto the central point of 3×3333\times 3 kernel, which can be easily implemented by first zero-padding the two 1×1111\times 1 kernels to 3×3333\times 3 and adding the three kernels up, as shown in Fig. 4. Note that the equivalence of such transformations requires the 3×3333\times 3 and 1×1111\times 1 layer to have the same stride, and the padding configuration of the latter shall be one pixel less than the former. For example, for a 3×3333\times 3 layer that pads the input by one pixel, which is the most common case, the 1×1111\times 1 layer should have padding = 0.
items.zh: 这种变换也适用于恒等分支，因为恒等可以视为以单位矩阵为核的 1×1 卷积。经过这样的变换，我们将得到一个 3×3 核、两个 1×1 核和三个偏置向量。然后，我们通过将三个偏置向量相加得到最终偏置，并通过将 1×1 核加到 3×3 核的中心点上得到最终 3×3 核，这可以通过首先将两个 1×1 核零填充到 3×3 然后将三个核相加来轻松实现，如图 4 所示。注意，这种变换的等价性要求 3×3 和 1×1 层具有相同的步长，并且后者的填充配置应比前者少一个像素。例如，对于最常见的将输入填充一个像素的 3×3 层，1×1 层应具有 padding=0。

items.capZh: 图 4：RepVGG 块的结构重参数化。为便于可视化，我们假设 C2=C1=2，因此 3×3 层有四个 3×3 矩阵，1×1 层的核是一个 2×2 矩阵。

items.en: We decide the numbers of layers of each stage following three simple guidelines. 1) The first stage operates with large resolution, which is time-consuming, so we use only one layer for lower latency. 2) The last stage shall have more channels, so we use only one layer to save the parameters. 3) We put the most layers into the second last stage (with 14×14141414\times 14 output resolution on ImageNet), following ResNet and its recent variants [12, 28, 38] (e.g., ResNet-101 uses 69 layers in its 14×14141414\times 14-resolution stage). We let the five stages have 1, 2, 4, 14, 1 layers respectively to construct an instance named RepVGG-A. We also build a deeper RepVGG-B, which has 2 more layers in stage2, 3 and 4. We use RepVGG-A to compete against other lightweight and middleweight models including ResNet-18/34/50, and RepVGG-B against the high-performance ones.
items.zh: 我们按照三个简单准则决定每个阶段的层数。1) 第一阶段处理大分辨率，耗时较多，因此我们只使用一层以降低延迟。2) 最后阶段应有更多通道，因此我们只使用一层以节省参数。3) 我们将最多的层放在倒数第二阶段（在 ImageNet 上输出分辨率为 14×14），遵循 ResNet 及其近期变体 [12, 28, 38]（例如，ResNet-101 在其 14×14 分辨率阶段使用了 69 层）。我们让五个阶段分别有 1、2、4、14、1 层，构建一个名为 RepVGG-A 的实例。我们还构建了一个更深的 RepVGG-B，在阶段 2、3 和 4 中多了 2 层。我们使用 RepVGG-A 与其他轻量级和中量级模型（包括 ResNet-18/34/50）竞争，而 RepVGG-B 则与高性能模型竞争。

items.en: We determine the layer width by uniformly scaling the classic width setting of [64,128,256,512]64128256512[64,128,256,512] (e.g., VGG and ResNets). We use multiplier a𝑎a to scale the first four stages and b𝑏b for the last stage, and usually set b>a𝑏𝑎b>a because we desire the last layer to have richer features for the classification or other down-stream tasks. Since RepVGG has only one layer in the last stage, a larger b𝑏b does not significantly increase the latency nor the amount of parameters. Specifically, the width of stage2, 3, 4, 5 is [64​a,128​a,256​a,512​b]64𝑎128𝑎256𝑎512𝑏[64a,128a,256a,512b], respectively. To avoid large-scale conv on high-resolution feature maps, we scale down stage1 if a<1𝑎1a<1 but do not scale it up, so that the width of stage1 is min​(64,64​a)min6464𝑎\text{min}(64,64a).
items.zh: 我们通过统一缩放经典宽度设置 [64,128,256,512]（例如 VGG 和 ResNet）来确定层宽度。我们使用乘数 a 缩放前四个阶段，b 缩放最后一个阶段，通常设置 b>a，因为我们希望最后一层具有更丰富的特征用于分类或其他下游任务。由于 RepVGG 在最后一个阶段只有一层，较大的 b 不会显著增加延迟或参数量。具体来说，阶段 2、3、4、5 的宽度分别为 [64a, 128a, 256a, 512b]。为避免在高分辨率特征图上进行大规模卷积，如果 a<1，我们缩小阶段 1 但不放大，因此阶段 1 的宽度为 min(64, 64a)。

items.en: To further reduce the parameters and computations, we may optionally interleave groupwise 3×3333\times 3 conv layers with dense ones to trade accuracy for efficiency. Specifically, we set the number of groups g𝑔g for the 3rd, 5th, 7th, …, 21st layer of RepVGG-A and the additional 23rd, 25th and 27th layers of RepVGG-B. For the simplicity, we set g𝑔g as 1, 2, or 4 globally for such layers without layer-wise tuning. We do not use adjacent groupwise conv layers because that would disable the inter-channel information exchange and bring a side effect [41]: outputs from a certain channel would be derived from only a small fraction of input channels. Note that the 1×1111\times 1 branch shall have the same g𝑔g as the 3×3333\times 3 conv.
items.zh: 为了进一步减少参数和计算量，我们可以选择性地将分组 3×3 卷积层与密集层交错，以牺牲精度换取效率。具体来说，我们为 RepVGG-A 的第 3、5、7、…、21 层以及 RepVGG-B 的额外第 23、25 和 27 层设置组数 g。为简单起见，我们全局地将 g 设置为 1、2 或 4，而不进行逐层调整。我们不使用相邻的分组卷积层，因为这会禁用通道间信息交换并带来副作用 [41]：来自某个通道的输出将仅来自输入通道的一小部分。注意，1×1 分支应具有与 3×3 卷积相同的 g。

items.en: We compare RepVGG with the baselines on ImageNet, justify the significance of structural re-parameterization by a series of ablation studies and comparisons, and verify the generalization performance on semantic segmentation [42].
items.zh: 我们在 ImageNet 上将 RepVGG 与基线进行比较，通过一系列消融研究和比较证明结构重参数化的重要性，并验证其在语义分割 [42] 上的泛化性能。

items.en: We compare RepVGG with the classic and state-of-the-art models including VGG-16 [31], ResNet [12], ResNeXt [38], EfficientNet [35], and RegNet [28] on ImageNet-1K [6], which comprises 1.28M images for training and 50K for validation. We use EfficientNet-B0/B3 and RegNet-3.2GF/12GF as the representatives for middleweight and heavyweight state-of-the-art models, respectively. We vary the multipliers a𝑎a and b𝑏b to generate a series of RepVGG models to compare against the baselines (Table. 3).
items.zh: 我们将 RepVGG 与经典和最先进的模型（包括 VGG-16 [31]、ResNet [12]、ResNeXt [38]、EfficientNet [35] 和 RegNet [28]）在 ImageNet-1K [6] 上进行比较，该数据集包含 128 万张训练图像和 5 万张验证图像。我们使用 EfficientNet-B0/B3 和 RegNet-3.2GF/12GF 分别作为中量级和重量级最先进模型的代表。我们改变乘数 a 和 b 生成一系列 RepVGG 模型，与基线进行比较（表 3）。

items.en: We first compare RepVGG against ResNets [12], which are the most common benchmarks. We use RepVGG-A0/A1/A2 for the comparisons with ResNet-18/34/50, respectively. To compare against the larger models, we construct the deeper RepVGG-B0/B1/B2/B3 with increasing width. For those RepVGG models with interleaved groupwise layers, we postfix g2/g4 to the model name.
items.zh: 我们首先将RepVGG与最常见的基准ResNet[12]进行比较。我们分别使用RepVGG-A0/A1/A2与ResNet-18/34/50进行比较。为了与更大的模型比较，我们构建了宽度递增的更深层RepVGG-B0/B1/B2/B3。对于这些具有交错分组层的RepVGG模型，我们在模型名称后添加g2/g4后缀。

items.en: For training the lightweight and middleweight models, we only use the simple data augmentation pipeline including random cropping and left-right flipping, following the official PyTorch example [27]. We use a global batch size of 256 on 8 GPUs, a learning rate initialized as 0.1 and cosine annealing for 120 epochs, standard SGD with momentum coefficient of 0.9 and weight decay of 10−4superscript10410^{-4} on the kernels of conv and fully-connected layers. For the heavyweight models including RegNetX-12GF, EfficientNet-B3 and RepVGG-B3, we use 5-epoch warmup, cosine learning rate annealing for 200 epochs, label smoothing [34] and mixup [40] (following [13]), and a data augmentation pipeline of Autoaugment [5], random cropping and flipping. RepVGG-B2 and its g2/g4 variants are trained in both settings. We test the speed of every model with a batch size of 128 on a 1080Ti GPU 444We use such a batch size because it is large enough to realize 100% GPU utilization of every tested model to simulate the actual application scenario pursuing the maximum QPS (Queries Per Second), and our GPU memory is insufficient for EfficientNet-B3 with a batch size of 256. by first feeding 50 batches to warm the hardware up, then 50 batches with time usage recorded. For the fair comparison, we test all the models on the same GPU, and all the conv-BN sequences of the baselines are also converted into a conv with bias (Eq. 3).
items.zh: 对于轻量级和中量级模型的训练，我们仅使用简单的数据增强流程，包括随机裁剪和左右翻转，遵循官方PyTorch示例[27]。我们在8个GPU上使用全局批量大小为256，学习率初始化为0.1，余弦退火调度训练120个epoch，标准SGD的动量为0.9，权重衰减为10^{-4}，应用于卷积层和全连接层的核。对于包括RegNetX-12GF、EfficientNet-B3和RepVGG-B3在内的重量级模型，我们使用5个epoch的预热、余弦学习率退火调度训练200个epoch、标签平滑[34]和mixup[40]（遵循[13]），以及包含Autoaugment[5]、随机裁剪和翻转的数据增强流程。RepVGG-B2及其g2/g4变体在两种设置下都进行了训练。我们在1080Ti GPU上以批量大小128测试每个模型的速度，首先输入50个批次预热硬件，然后记录50个批次的时间使用情况。为了公平比较，我们在同一GPU上测试所有模型，并且所有基线的conv-BN序列也转换为带偏置的卷积（公式3）。

items.en: Compared with the state-of-the-art baselines, RepVGG also shows favorable performance, considering its simplicity: RepVGG-A2 is 1.37%/59% better than EfficientNet-B0, RepVGG-B1 performs 0.39% better than RegNetX-3.2GF and runs slightly faster. Notably, RepVGG models reach above 80% accuracy with 200 epochs (Table. 5), which is the first time for plain models to catch up with the state-of-the-arts, to the best of our knowledge. Compared to RegNetX-12GF, RepVGG-B3 runs 31% faster, which is impressive considering that RepVGG does not require a lot of manpower to refine the design space like RegNet [28], and the architectural hyper-parameters are set casually.
items.zh: 与最先进的基线相比，考虑到其简单性，RepVGG也表现出良好的性能：RepVGG-A2比EfficientNet-B0好1.37%/59%，RepVGG-B1比RegNetX-3.2GF好0.39%且运行稍快。值得注意的是，RepVGG模型在200个epoch内达到80%以上的准确率（表5），据我们所知，这是普通模型首次赶上最先进水平。与RegNetX-12GF相比，RepVGG-B3运行速度快31%，考虑到RepVGG不需要像RegNet[28]那样投入大量人力来优化设计空间，且架构超参数是随意设置的，这一结果令人印象深刻。

items.en: As two proxies of computational complexity, we count the theoretical FLOPs and Wino MULs as described in Sect. 2.4. For example, we found out that none of the conv in EfficientNet-B0/B3 is accelerated by Winograd algorithm. Table. 4 shows Wino MULs is a better proxy on GPU, e.g., ResNet-152 runs slower than VGG-16 with lower theoretical FLOPs but higher Wino MULs. Of course, the actual speed should always be the golden standard.
items.zh: 作为计算复杂度的两个代理指标，我们按照第2.4节所述计算理论FLOPs和Wino MULs。例如，我们发现EfficientNet-B0/B3中的卷积均未被Winograd算法加速。表4显示Wino MULs在GPU上是更好的代理指标，例如，ResNet-152运行速度比VGG-16慢，尽管其理论FLOPs更低但Wino MULs更高。当然，实际速度始终是黄金标准。

items.en: In this subsection, we verify the significance of our structural re-parameterization technique (Table. 6). All the models are trained from scratch for 120 epochs with the same simple training settings described above. First, we conduct ablation studies by removing the identity and/or 1×1111\times 1 branch from every block of RepVGG-B0. With both branches removed, the training-time model degrades into an ordinary plain model and only achieves 72.39% accuracy. The accuracy is lifted to 73.15% with 1×1111\times 1 or 74.79% with identity. The accuracy of the full featured RepVGG-B0 is 75.14%, which is 2.75% higher than the ordinary plain model. Seen from the inference speed of the training-time (i.e., not yet converted) models, removing the identity and 1×1111\times 1 branches via structural re-parameterization brings significant speedup.
items.zh: 在本小节中，我们验证了结构重参数化技术的重要性（表6）。所有模型均使用上述相同简单训练设置从头训练120个epoch。首先，我们通过从RepVGG-B0的每个块中移除恒等分支和/或1×1分支进行消融研究。移除两个分支后，训练时模型退化为普通模型，仅达到72.39%的准确率。添加1×1分支后准确率提升至73.15%，添加恒等分支后提升至74.79%。完整特征的RepVGG-B0准确率为75.14%，比普通模型高2.75%。从训练时（即尚未转换）模型的推理速度来看，通过结构重参数化移除恒等和1×1分支带来了显著的加速。

items.en: Then we construct a series of variants and baselines for comparison on RepVGG-B0 (Table. 7). Again, all the models are trained from scratch in 120 epochs.
items.zh: 然后，我们在RepVGG-B0上构建了一系列变体和基线进行比较（表7）。同样，所有模型均从头训练120个epoch。

items.en: Identity w/o BN removes the BN in identity branch.
items.zh: 无BN的恒等分支移除了恒等分支中的BN。

items.en: Post-addition BN removes the BN layers in the three branches and appends a BN layer after the addition. In other words, the position of BN is changed from pre-addition to post-addition.
items.zh: 后加法BN移除了三个分支中的BN层，并在加法后附加一个BN层。换句话说，BN的位置从加法前改为加法后。

items.en: +ReLU in branches inserts ReLU into each branch (after BN and before addition). Since such a block cannot be converted into a single conv layer, it is of no practical use, and we merely desire to see whether more nonlinearity will bring higher performance.
items.zh: +分支中的ReLU在每个分支中插入ReLU（在BN之后、加法之前）。由于这样的块无法转换为单个卷积层，因此没有实际用途，我们只是想看看更多的非线性是否会带来更高的性能。

items.en: DiracNet [39] adopts a well-designed re-parameterization of conv kernels, as introduced in Sect. 2.2. We use its official PyTorch code to build the layers to replace the original 3×3333\times 3 conv.
items.zh: DiracNet[39]采用了精心设计的卷积核重参数化，如第2.2节所述。我们使用其官方PyTorch代码构建层来替换原始的3×3卷积。

items.en: Trivial Re-param is a simpler re-parameterization of conv kernels by directly adding an identity kernel to the 3×3333\times 3 kernel, which can be viewed a degraded version of DiracNet (W^=I+W^WIW\hat{\mathrm{W}}=\mathrm{I}+\mathrm{W} [39]).
items.zh: 平凡重参数化是一种更简单的卷积核重参数化，通过直接将恒等核添加到3×3核中，可以看作是DiracNet的退化版本（W^=I+W [39]）。

items.en: Asymmetric Conv Block (ACB) [10] can be viewed as another form of structural re-parameterization. We compare with ACB to see whether the improvement of our structural re-parameterization is due to the component-level over-parameterization (i.e., the extra parameters making every 3×3333\times 3 conv stronger).
items.zh: 非对称卷积块（ACB）[10]可以看作是结构重参数化的另一种形式。我们与ACB进行比较，以查看我们的结构重参数化的改进是否是由于组件级过参数化（即额外的参数使每个3×3卷积更强）。

items.en: Residual Reorg builds each stage by re-organizing it in a ResNet-like manner (2 layers per block). Specifically, the resultant model has one 3×3333\times 3 layer in the first and last stages and 2, 3, 8 residual blocks in stage2, 3, 4, and uses shortcuts just like ResNet-18/34.
items.zh: 残差重组通过以类似ResNet的方式（每块2层）重组每个阶段来构建模型。具体来说，得到的模型在第一和最后一个阶段有一个3×3层，在阶段2、3、4中有2、3、8个残差块，并使用类似ResNet-18/34的捷径连接。

items.en: We reckon the superiority of structural re-param over DiractNet and Trivial Re-param lies in the fact that the former relies on the actual dataflow through a concrete structure with nonlinear behavior (BN), while the latter merely uses another mathematical expression of conv kernels. The former “re-param” means “using the params of a structure to parameterize another structure”, but the latter means “computing the params first with another set of params, then using them for other computations”. With nonlinear components like a training-time BN, the former cannot be approximated by the latter. As evidences, the accuracy is decreased by removing the BN and improved by adding ReLU. In other words, though a RepVGG block can be equivalently converted into a single conv for inference, the inference-time equivalence does not imply the training-time equivalence, as we cannot construct a conv layer to have the same training-time behavior as a RepVGG block.
items.zh: 我们认为结构重参数化优于DiracNet和平凡重参数化，原因在于前者依赖于通过具有非线性行为（BN）的具体结构的实际数据流，而后者仅使用卷积核的另一种数学表达。前者的“重参数化”意味着“使用一个结构的参数来参数化另一个结构”，但后者意味着“首先用另一组参数计算参数，然后将其用于其他计算”。由于包含训练时BN等非线性组件，前者无法被后者近似。证据是，移除BN会降低准确率，而添加ReLU会提高准确率。换句话说，尽管RepVGG块可以等价地转换为单个卷积用于推理，但推理时的等价性并不意味着训练时的等价性，因为我们无法构造一个具有与RepVGG块相同训练时行为的卷积层。

items.en: The comparison with ACB suggests the success of RepVGG should not be simply attributed to the effect of over-parameterization of every component, since ACB uses more parameters but yields inferior performance. As a double check, we replace every 3×3333\times 3 conv of ResNet-50 with a RepVGG block and train from scratch for 120 epochs. The accuracy is 76.34%, which is merely 0.03% higher than the ResNet-50 baseline, suggesting that RepVGG-style structural re-parameterization is not a generic over-parameterization technique, but a methodology critical for training powerful plain ConvNets. Compared to Residual Reorg, a real residual network with the same number of 3×3333\times 3 conv and additional shortcuts for both training and inference, RepVGG outperforms by 0.58%, which is not surprising since RepVGG has far more branches. For example, the branches make stage4 of RepVGG an ensemble of 2×315=2.8×1072superscript3152.8superscript1072\times 3^{15}=2.8\times 10^{7} models [36], while the number for Residual Reorg is 28=256superscript282562^{8}=256.
items.zh: 与ACB的比较表明，RepVGG的成功不应简单归因于每个组件的过参数化效果，因为ACB使用了更多参数但性能较差。作为双重检查，我们将ResNet-50的每个3×3卷积替换为RepVGG块，并从头训练120个epoch。准确率为76.34%，仅比ResNet-50基线高0.03%，这表明RepVGG风格的结构重参数化并非通用的过参数化技术，而是训练强大普通ConvNet的关键方法。与残差重组（一个真正的残差网络，具有相同数量的3×3卷积以及训练和推理时额外的捷径连接）相比，RepVGG高出0.58%，这并不奇怪，因为RepVGG拥有更多的分支。例如，分支使得RepVGG的阶段4成为2×3^{15}=2.8×10^7个模型的集成[36]，而残差重组的数量为2^8=256。

items.en: We verify the generalization performance of ImageNet-pretrained RepVGG for semantic segmentation on Cityscapes [4] (Table. 8). We use the PSPNet [42] framework, a poly learning rate policy with base of 0.01 and power of 0.9, weight decay of 10−4superscript10410^{-4} and a global batch size of 16 on 8 GPUs for 40 epochs. For the fair comparison, we only change the ResNet-50/101 backbone to RepVGG-B1g2/B2 and keep other settings identical. Following the official PSPNet-50/101 [42] which uses dilated conv in the last two stages of ResNet-50/101, we also make all the 3×3333\times 3 conv layers in the last two stages of RepVGG-B1g2/B2 dilated. However, the current inefficient implementation of 3×3333\times 3 dilated conv (though the FLOPs is the same as 3×3333\times 3 regular conv) slows down the inference. For the ease of comparison, we build another two PSPNets (denoted by fast) with dilation only in the last 5 layers (i.e., the last 4 layers of stage4 and the only layer of stage5), so that the PSPNets run slightly faster than the ResNet-50/101-backbone counterparts. RepVGG backbones outperform ResNet-50 and ResNet-101 by 1.71% and 1.01% respectively in mean IoU with higher speed, and RepVGG-B1g2-fast outperforms the ResNet-101 backbone by 0.37 in mIoU and runs 62% faster. Interestingly, dilation seems more effective for larger models, as using more dilated conv layers does not improve the performance compared to RepVGG-B1g2-fast, but raises the mIoU of RepVGG-B2 by 1.05% with reasonable slowdown.
items.zh: 我们验证了ImageNet预训练的RepVGG在Cityscapes[4]语义分割上的泛化性能（表8）。我们使用PSPNet[42]框架，采用多项式学习率策略，基数为0.01，幂为0.9，权重衰减为10^{-4}，在8个GPU上全局批量大小为16，训练40个epoch。为了公平比较，我们仅将ResNet-50/101骨干网络替换为RepVGG-B1g2/B2，并保持其他设置相同。遵循官方PSPNet-50/101[42]在ResNet-50/101的最后两个阶段使用空洞卷积的做法，我们也将RepVGG-B1g2/B2最后两个阶段中的所有3×3卷积层设为空洞卷积。然而，当前3×3空洞卷积的低效实现（尽管FLOPs与常规3×3卷积相同）减慢了推理速度。为了便于比较，我们构建了另外两个PSPNet（记为fast），仅在最后5层（即阶段4的最后4层和阶段5的唯一一层）使用空洞卷积，使得PSPNet的运行速度略快于ResNet-50/101骨干网络对应的版本。RepVGG骨干网络在平均IoU上分别以更高速度超过ResNet-50和ResNet-101 1.71%和1.01%，RepVGG-B1g2-fast在mIoU上超过ResNet-101骨干网络0.37，且运行速度快62%。有趣的是，空洞卷积对更大模型似乎更有效，因为使用更多空洞卷积层并未比RepVGG-B1g2-fast提升性能，但使RepVGG-B2的mIoU提高了1.05%，同时速度合理下降。

items.en: RepVGG models are fast, simple and practical ConvNets designed for the maximum speed on GPU and specialized hardware, less concerning the number of parameters. They are more parameter-efficient than ResNets but may be less favored than the mobile-regime models like MobileNets [16, 30, 15] and ShuffleNets [41, 24] for low-power devices.
items.zh: RepVGG模型是快速、简单且实用的ConvNet，专为GPU和专用硬件上的最大速度而设计，较少关注参数数量。它们比ResNet参数效率更高，但对于低功耗设备，可能不如MobileNet[16,30,15]和ShuffleNet[41,24]等移动端模型受欢迎。

items.en: We proposed RepVGG, a simple architecture with a stack of 3×3333\times 3 conv and ReLU, which is especially suitable for GPU and specialized inference chips. With our structural re-parameterization method, it reaches over 80% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet and shows favorable speed-accuracy trade-off compared to the state-of-the-art models.
items.zh: 我们提出了RepVGG，一种简单的架构，由堆叠的3×3卷积和ReLU组成，特别适用于GPU和专用推理芯片。通过我们的结构重参数化方法，它在ImageNet上达到了超过80%的top-1准确率，并显示出与最先进模型相比有利的速度-准确率权衡。
